textByHash.11c0737f18f5baec9a21bb0ec33589d2063a4d0d: Yes! They call it Varlamore, the Shining Kingdom! It's meant to be one of the most beautiful places in the world!
textByHash.12c598b596fe013b44c16f2082880a1a36302478: Oh, hello! Are you here to see the delegation?
textByHash.13055595f8ac96f6815f0ea0bcbb16e15eaa9b3f: That's the spirit! I bet you'll want to be one of the first to head over to Varlamore!
textByHash.19c058b25c8005db197a39017133b9a395203472: Well it should be any time now!
textByHash.2687d72bb531a2a16f1646cec9436dad33692eeb: Oh, nothing you need to worry about.
textByHash.2f79fec4101fbfb3eab29d21b0a050c955a83d7d: They stayed the night in the Blue Moon Inn and spent hours telling us all about their homeland. I've been dying to visit ever since!
textByHash.382d18ffdba89b2357d7125017d3cfed808a8edd: A while back, a group of travellers came through here, on their way to the dark lands of Morytania. They said they were from the College of Bards!
textByHash.497c119ff697730cab48af6f3cfaf424d3b3303d: That's right! They have their own religion over there dedicated to the sun and the moon. Isn't that fascinating?
textByHash.5ca5e0214d21097878deb61312be1a104b755bf2: Yes! She rules from her palace in their capital, Civitas illa Fortis. The sun plays an important role in Varlamorian life. In fact, they worship it!
textByHash.6c36c4f2912ecf1aeeb7658902eafffd3640f21b: It means High Priest. He's the religious leader in Varlamore.
textByHash.6ce6ebd9b1c8197dddd5788a887d0d71cdccce1a: Sorry, I can't stop to talk right now.
textByHash.9945bb4386a6ba824835b8b96d2ffa4e0733ee2f: The delegation from Varlamore, of course! After all these years, they're finally opening up the kingdom for travel and trade! Isn't it exciting?
textByHash.a9436c2b21932d8ffa56250ba49a2390279ba463: Yes! It's found in the floating city of Tempestus! Members of the College are some of the only people allowed to travel to and from Varlamore.
textByHash.ac75e09dc32b98830f0683abd9a6fe593a070c7e: Hello again! So what do you think? Reckon you'll be one of the first to head over to Varlamore?
textByHash.b1973a0d17815a64ba8976c76391802bfb21e529: There they are: The children of the sun! That's Itzla Arkan, heir to the throne of Varlamore! And there's Servius, the Teokan of Ralos!
textByHash.cc1c05a0e1d86b5aaeb296c0aea4e25fcbc025c0: It's far across the western sea, over the mountains south of Great Kourend. Between the sea and the mountains, it's totally isolated! No one is allowed to come or go without good reason.
textByHash.ed197226c730b8ebb9764de881e9e79afa8054e0: A whole land locked off for hundreds of years! Do you not want to be one of the first outsiders to step foot there? Think of the adventure!
textByHash.f31b807dda627b3c5c8f0aac65b23dc5f171ac0b: Bah! Boring! What about you, stranger?
textByHash.fb12e5c0a8ddd7244b79683f354212c239f7feb2: Quite the opposite! It's a beautiful and prosperous kingdom, ruled over by the Sun Queen!
